highlights.h1Title: Unforgettable adventures led by local experts
highlights.h1Desc: From snorkeling in coral reefs to desert safaris, our guides have a passion for the location and know the best moments and places for every experience.
highlights.h2Title: Your trip the way you like it
highlights.h2Desc: Family trip? Honeymoon? Business trip? Group of friends? We design every experience based on your needs — from choosing dates to the small details that make a difference.

finalCta.title: Ready for your next adventure?

safari.subtitle: The ultimate desert experience in Sharm El Sheikh
safari.introDesc: Join us for an unforgettable journey into the heart of the Sinai desert. Whether you're looking for high-speed thrills on a quad bike or a peaceful evening enjoying Bedouin hospitality, Ayoub Safari has something for everyone.
safari.atvDesc: Feel the adrenaline as you ride our top-of-the-line ATVs and buggies across the vast desert dunes. Perfect for both beginners and experienced riders.
safari.adventuresDesc: Explore the hidden valleys, echoing mountains, and the majestic landscape of the Sinai desert with our expert local guides.
safari.dinnerDesc: End your day with an authentic Bedouin dinner under the stars, featuring traditional food, fire shows, and cultural performances.
safari.captureDesc: Stunning sunrise and sunset tours offering the perfect lighting and backdrop for unforgettable photos.
safari.includesTitle: What's Included in our Premium Packages

single.title: Single ATV Safari
single.desc: Ride your own ATV across the beautiful Sinai desert.
single.longDesc: Experience the ultimate freedom of the desert on your own ATV. This tour is designed for thrill-seekers who want to navigate the golden sand dunes of Sinai at their own pace.
included: Bedouin tea break in the desert
highlights: ATV riding in the Sinai desert

double.title: Double ATV Safari
double.desc: Share the thrill with a friend on a two-person ATV.
double.longDesc: Share the excitement with a partner on a double ATV. Perfect for couples or friends, you can switch drivers midway and enjoy the breathtaking views together.
included: Bedouin tea break in the desert
highlights: Shared ATV riding in the Sinai desert

buggy2.title: 2-Seater Buggy Safari
buggy2.desc: Drive our powerful 2-seater side-by-side desert buggies.
buggy2.longDesc: Take control of our powerful 2-seater side-by-side buggies. These robust vehicles offer a comfortable yet thrilling ride through the desert landscape, with a roll cage for extra safety.

buggy4.title: 4-Seater Buggy Safari
buggy4.desc: Perfect for families or groups of friends looking for adventure together.
buggy4.longDesc: The ultimate group adventure! Our 4-seater buggies are perfect for families or groups of friends. Enjoy the off-road experience together in one vehicle.
highlights: Family off-road driving in a 4-seater buggy

dinner.title: ATV Safari, Camel Ride & Bedouin Dinner
dinner.desc: The ultimate desert experience including an ATV ride, camel riding, and a traditional dinner under the stars.
dinner.longDesc: A complete desert experience combining adventure with Bedouin culture. Start with an exhilarating ATV ride, enjoy a peaceful camel ride, and end the evening with a traditional Bedouin dinner and show under the stars.

transfer.subtitle: Safe, Reliable, and Comfortable Transportation
transfer.introDesc: We offer premium transportation services across the Sinai Peninsula. Our modern fleet and professional drivers ensure you reach your destination safely and on time.
transfer.f1Desc: 24/7 availability with guaranteed on-time pickups from airports and hotels.
transfer.f2Desc: Fully insured vehicles and experienced, licensed professional drivers.
transfer.f3Desc: Comfortable air-conditioned cars, minivans, and buses for all group sizes.
transfer.d2Desc: Comfortable trips to the Blue Hole city
transfer.d5Desc: Direct transfers to the National Park
transfer.ctaDesc: Contact us with your itinerary and group size for a personalized quote.
